config.script:
"""
		Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
		Written Date: 13/03/2025
		Purpose:			 
				check whether user is authenticated if not return to login poge
	"""	
	try:
	#start of try block
		previousPage = self.session.custom.IsTagHistorianAuthenticated
		if not previousPage:
			system.perspective.navigate('/')
		else:
			self.session.custom.TopViewHeader = "Historian"	
	#End of try block	
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='HistorianStatus'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/TagHistorian/HistorianStatus')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onStartup -> HistorianStatus')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 
	#End of except block

onChange.script:
"""
		Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
		Written Date: 27/06/2024
		Purpose: Make Line value set to default. 
	"""
	self.parent.parent.getChild("cntLine").getChild("drpLine").props.value = -1

"""
		Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
		Written Date: 27/06/2024
		Purpose: Make Station value set to default. 
	"""
	self.parent.parent.getChild("cntStation").getChild("drpStation").props.value = -1

config.script:
Project_VECV.PopUp.loader.openLoader(True)
	Plant='Dewas'
	AreaVal=self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntFlex").getChild("cntArea").getChild("drpArea").props.value
	LineVal=self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntFlex").getChild("cntLine").getChild("drpLine").props.value
	WorkstationVal=self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntFlex").getChild("cntStation").getChild("drpStation").props.value
	if AreaVal!=-1 and LineVal!=-1 and WorkstationVal!=-1:
		Areadtset=self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntFlex").getChild("cntArea").getChild("drpArea").props.options
		Areadtset1=system.dataset.toPyDataSet(Areadtset)
		for i in Areadtset1:
			if i[0]==AreaVal:
				Area=i[1]
				
		Linedtset=self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntFlex").getChild("cntLine").getChild("drpLine").props.options
		Linedtset1=system.dataset.toPyDataSet(Linedtset)
		for i in Linedtset1:
			if i[0]==LineVal:
				Line=i[1]
				
		Workstationdtset=self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntFlex").getChild("cntStation").getChild("drpStation").props.options
		Workstationdtset1=system.dataset.toPyDataSet(Workstationdtset)
		for i in Workstationdtset1:
			if i[0]==WorkstationVal:
				Workstation=i[1]

		tagName=Plant+'/'+Area+'/'+Line+'/'+Workstation
		system.perspective.print(tagName)
		self.view.params.TagName=tagName
		month = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntDate").getChild("FlexContainer").getChild("drpmonth").props.value
		year = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntDate").getChild("FlexContainer").getChild("drpyear").props.value
		StartDateTime = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntDate").getChild("FlexContainer").getChild("StartDate").props.value
		EndDateTime = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntDate").getChild("FlexContainer").getChild("EndDate").props.value
		if month == -1 or year == -1:
			GETDATE = system.date.now()
		else:
			GETDATE = system.date.getDate(int(year), int(month), 15)
		system.perspective.print({"Station":Workstation, "GETDATE" : GETDATE,'StartDateTime':StartDateTime,'EndDateTime':EndDateTime})
		data=system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/TagHistorian/Historian",{"Station":Workstation, "GETDATE" : GETDATE,'StartDateTime':StartDateTime,'EndDateTime':EndDateTime})
		self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("Table").props.data=data
	else:
		self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("Table").props.data=[]
	Project_VECV.PopUp.loader.openLoader(False)

"""
		Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
		Written Date: 27/06/2024
		Purpose: Passing dropdown values to Parameteres. 
	"""
	
#	if self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntFlex").getChild("cntModel").getChild("drpModel").props.value==None:
#		self.view.params.Model=-1
#	else:
#		self.view.params.Model=self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntFlex").getChild("cntModel").getChild("drpModel").props.value
	if self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntFlex").getChild("cntArea").getChild("drpArea").props.value==None:
		self.view.params.Area=-1
	else:
		self.view.params.Area=self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntFlex").getChild("cntArea").getChild("drpArea").props.value
	if self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntFlex").getChild("cntLine").getChild("drpLine").props.value==None:
		self.view.params.Line=-1
	else:
		self.view.params.Line=self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntFlex").getChild("cntLine").getChild("drpLine").props.value
	if self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntFlex").getChild("cntStation").getChild("drpStation").props.value==None:
		self.view.params.Workstation=-1
	else:
		self.view.params.Workstation=self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntFlex").getChild("cntStation").getChild("drpStation").props.value

"""
		Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
		Written Date: 27/06/2024
		Purpose: CLEAR ALL FILTER SELECTION. 
	"""
	#CLEAR ALL FILTER SELECTION
	self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntFlex").getChild("cntArea").getChild("drpArea").props.value = -1
	self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntFlex").getChild("cntLine").getChild("drpLine").props.value = -1
	self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntFlex").getChild("cntStation").getChild("drpStation").props.value = -1
	self.view.params.Area=-1
	self.view.params.Line=-1
	self.view.params.Workstation=-1
	self.parent.parent.getChild("cntDate").getChild("FlexContainer").getChild("drpmonth").props.value = -1
	self.parent.parent.getChild("cntDate").getChild("FlexContainer").getChild("drpyear").props.value = -1
	self.parent.parent.getChild("cntDate").getChild("FlexContainer").getChild("StartDate").props.value = None
	self.parent.parent.getChild("cntDate").getChild("FlexContainer").getChild("EndDate").props.value = None
	self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("Table").props.data=[]

"""
		Written By: Sanket Landge
		Written Date: 16/10/2025
		Purpose:			 
				Export Tag History Table Data to Excel with Headers
	"""	
	try:
		import datetime
		 
		table = self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("Table")
		 
		headers = ["TagId", "TagPath", "TagName", "Value", "DateTime"]
		fields = ["tagid", "tagpath", "TagName", "dataValues", "Timestamp"]
		 
		data = table.props.data
		 
		rows = []
		 
		# Case 1: data is a list of dicts (typical Perspective Table)
		if isinstance(data, list) and len(data) > 0 and isinstance(data[0], dict):
		    for row in data:
		        rows.append([row.get(field, "") for field in fields])
		 
		# Case 2: data is a PyDataset object (from DB/query), access by column index
		elif hasattr(data, "getValueAt"):
		    col_names = [data.getColumnName(i) for i in range(data.getColumnCount())]
		    field_indices = [col_names.index(field) if field in col_names else -1 for field in fields]
		    for row_idx in range(data.getRowCount()):
		        row_out = []
		        for idx in field_indices:
		            if idx >= 0:
		                row_out.append(data.getValueAt(row_idx, idx))
		            else:
		                row_out.append("")
		        rows.append(row_out)
		 
		# If empty, do nothing (optional)
		 
		dataset = system.dataset.toDataSet(headers, rows)
		sheetNames = ["TagHistory"]
		excelBytes = system.dataset.toExcel(True, [dataset], sheetNames)
		timestamp = datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")
		fileName = "TagHistoryExport_{}.xlsx".format(timestamp)
		system.perspective.download(fileName, excelBytes)
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='HistorianStatus'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/TagHistorian/HistorianStatus')  
		errorFunction = str('imgDownload -> OnClick')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)
